note: Chosen by scripts/discover-test-patients.mjs — scored by resource-type breadth × 15 + total volume across 40-patient sample

patients.label: Coleman Ortiz | male | DOB: 1915-07-03
patients.notes: Highest volume (578 resources). Long life history spanning 110 years. Deep observation and diagnostic report series. Use for compartment rendering, pagination, and lab result display tests.

patients.label: Hallie Hoeger | female | DOB: 1926-06-06
patients.notes: 55 MedicationRequests — highest of any candidate. 71 encounters. Good for testing medication list pagination, encounter history, and polypharmacy edge cases.

patients.label: Emilee Ritchie | female | DOB: 1924-12-30
patients.notes: High immunization count (12) alongside dense observations and encounters. Good counterpart to Hallie for female-patient tests across conditions, meds, and immunizations.

patients.label: Hobert Murazik | male | DOB: 1963-01-06
patients.notes: Only patient in sample with all 9/9 resource types populated, including AllergyIntolerance. Younger profile (63 at discovery). Critical for testing allergy rendering and full-breadth compartment navigation.
